title: derris heyneana
intro: Derris heyneana, also known as the Kanthari root, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Derris heyneana include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antidote for snake bites. Derris heyneana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine preparations to treat various health conditions.
